records.ety: [OE. thew, þeau, manner, habit, strength, AS. þew manner, habit (cf. þwan to drive); akin to OS. thau custom, habit, OHG. dou. √56.]

defs: Manner; custom; habit; form of behavior; qualities of mind; disposition; specifically, good qualities; virtues.
quotes: For her great light Of sapience, and for her thews clear.
To be upbrought in gentle thews and martial might.

defs: Muscle or strength; nerve; brawn; sinew.
quotes: And I myself, who sat apart And watched them, waxed in every limb; I felt the thews of Anakim, The pules of a Titan's heart.
